'''Umwaw Moolis''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] and the [[Ottega sector/Legends|Ottega sector]] circa [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. She greeted [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] as they arrived on Ithor for the [[Herd Meet/Legends|Time of Meeting]] only to have the meeting interrupted by [[Drub McKumb]] trying to warn Han Solo. She later allowed Skywalker to borrow the ship ''[[Huntbird]]'' when he searched for the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
